author: junsong_eth
content: SSZ Engine Update: Prysm just implemented as per the latest spec commit (`d39e9a2`) in the working [PR](https://github.com/OffchainLabs/prysm/pull/16901). Also submitted a PR to build the docker image for this: https://github.com/ethpandaops/eth-client-docker-image-builder/pull/393. Would be glad if this could be included! <@412614104222531604>

author: etan_status
content: you don't need to run a PR  for building, you can just use /build client-cl in discord 🙂 any channel on eth r&d discord works
